calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust And (Heggstad) Trust Assets.
Off Calendar Jul-31-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gerald Stokes for Benjamin Mayshack.

Mr. Stokes stated that there is no opposition, that the Estate case number is PES-13-296649, that the Trust is limited to the two properties and that the Estate matter will proceed. The Court granted the Petition for Order Confirming Trust and Trust Assets (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)
